subcodes.first_line: The missive was penned in the melody of Hijaz and dispatched, and this epistle is being set forth in the Persian tongue that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کاغذ بلحن حجازی نوشته شد و ارسال گشت و این نوشته بزبان پارسی القا میشود تا
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
